activities.name: Get a range of months to look back

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
	  DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())), 0) AS StartOfMonth
	, EOMONTH(CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())) AS EndOfMonth

items.value: @activity('Get a range of months to look back').output.value

dependsOn.activity: Get a range of months to look back

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEDIFF(month, '2025-08-01', CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()))) AS MonthsBack

activities.name: How many months back do we need to go

value.value: @activity('How many months back do we need to go').output.firstRow.MonthsBack

dependsOn.activity: How many months back do we need to go
